question_text:
Propose plausible immediate precursors for the target molecule.

Use the structured benchmark context below as the full task specification.
Return the best chemistry answer grounded only in this context.

<benchmark_context>
{
  "level": "B",
  "task_family": "Single-Step Retrosynthesis",
  "task_subtype": "immediate_precursor_prediction",
  "difficulty": "hard",
  "coverage_tags": [
    "precursor_set",
    "constraints",
    "procedure_context"
  ],
  "benchmark_suite": "B",
  "benchmark_subtrack": "B1",
  "planning_horizon": "single_step",
  "task_mode": "constrained_generation",
  "difficulty_proxies": [
    "precursor_count",
    "disconnection_obviousness",
    "procedure_context_constraints"
  ],
  "eval_contract_id": "level_b.plausible_immediate_precursor.v2",
  "expected_output_schema": "plausible_immediate_precursor_set",
  "judge_rubric_id": "g_eval.level_b.plausible_immediate_precursor.v2",
  "input": {
    "target": "CN1CCO[C@@H]2c3cccc4[nH]cc(c34)C[C@H]21"
  }
}
</benchmark_context>
benchmark_v3_input_text: Propose plausible immediate precursors for the target molecule.

benchmark_v3_metadata.procedure_details: Sodium hydride (50% in mineral oil, 1.1 gms, 0.045 m) is added in portions to a stirred solution of trans 4-(p-tolylsulphonyl)-4,6,6a,8,9,10a hexahydro-7H-indolo-[3,4 gh]-[1,4] benzoxazin-8-one (7.0 gm, 0.018 m) in DMF (14 ml). The resulting mixture is stirred at room temperature for 1/2 hour. Methyl iodide (5.0 gm, 0.035 m) is added dropwise to the reaction mixture. After stirring an additional 1/2 hour, the reaction solution is poured into water, and the solid is removed by filtration. The tan solid is chromatographed (silica, chloroform) to give 3 gms of trans-4,6,6a,8,9,10a-Hexahydro-7-methyl-7H-indolo-[3,4 gh]-[1.4]-benzoxazine.
benchmark_v3_metadata.selection_note: ORDerly official retrosynthesis test split row.
